rulings.Case Title: MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA VS. VINH LUC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Mnday, July 03, 2017, line 1. DEFENDANT VINH LUC's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant to file answer responsive to Complaint filed on May 4, 2017 no later than July 3, 2017 by 4:00 p.m. = (501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz
